query:
INSERT INTO timeline_events (event_date, title, summary, case_number, category, status, public_status, issue_tags, story_id) VALUES
('2025-01-06', 'State files motion for contempt over pro se filings', 'State filed motion for contempt seeking jail time for pro se filings. Exhibit spreadsheet also links this date to initiation of 42 U.S.C. Section 1983 federal action.', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'confirmed', 1, '["retaliation_first_amendment","faretta_self_representation"]', 60001),
('2025-01-22', 'Trial and pretrial motions hearing vacated pending competency', 'Order vacated March 2025 trial and pretrial motions hearing pending competency proceedings.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["speedy_trial_delay","competency_proceeding_abuse"]', 60001),
('2025-04-18', 'State moves for no-bail hold', 'State moved for no-bail hold citing harassment patterns and noncompliance with orders per exhibit spreadsheet. State allegations.', 'CR23-0657', 'custody', 'confirmed', 1, '["warrant_or_bail_defect","retaliation_first_amendment"]', 60001),
('2025-04-23', 'Warrant service', 'Warrant-service document dated April 23, 2025 in record set.', 'CR23-0657', 'warrant', 'confirmed', 1, '["warrant_or_bail_defect"]', 60001),
('2025-04-25', 'Competency court order — transfer to Department 7', 'Nunc pro tunc/order-for-competency record transferred case to Department 7 / competency court.', 'CR23-0657', 'competency', 'confirmed', 1, '["competency_proceeding_abuse","nunc_pro_tunc_concern"]', 60001),
('2025-05-23', 'First competency report — Lindsay Coyle', 'Forensic competency report by Lindsay Coyle filed in CR23-0657. Contains medical/mental-health information; redaction required before public posting.', 'CR23-0657', 'competency', 'confirmed', 1, '["competency_proceeding_abuse"]', 60001),
('2025-05-28', 'Second competency report — Dr. Rachael Pinkerman', 'Confidential competency evaluation by Dr. Rachael Pinkerman. Exhibit index states evaluator found competency under Dusky standard and noted refusal to participate due to retaliation. Redaction required.', 'CR23-0657', 'competency', 'confirmed', 1, '["competency_proceeding_abuse","retaliation_first_amendment"]', 60001),
('2025-06-05', 'Parties stipulate to third competency evaluation', 'Parties stipulated to third competency evaluation due to conflicting opinions from first two evaluators.', 'CR23-0657', 'competency', 'confirmed', 1, '["competency_proceeding_abuse"]', 60001),
('2025-06-06', 'Defense counsel Samuel Figueroa moves to withdraw', 'Samuel Figueroa moved to withdraw citing relationship breakdown and defendant''s desire for self-representation or motions counsel considered repugnant.', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'confirmed', 1, '["faretta_self_representation"]', 60001),
('2025-06-09', 'Court orders third competency evaluation', 'Court ordered third competency evaluation.', 'CR23-0657', 'competency', 'confirmed', 1, '["competency_proceeding_abuse","speedy_trial_delay"]', 60001),
('2025-06-26', 'Third competency report — Lisa Foerster', 'Forensic report by Lisa Foerster. Exhibit index states report found competence and described sophisticated understanding of legal process. Redaction required.', 'CR23-0657', 'competency', 'confirmed', 1, '["competency_proceeding_abuse"]', 60001),
('2025-07-01', 'Competency court remand — defendant found competent', 'Record set includes proposed/order materials finding competence and remanding case from competency court.', 'CR23-0657', 'competency', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2025-07-03', 'Substitution of attorney — Joel Merchant enters as counsel', 'Substitution of attorney relieved prior counsel and substituted Joel Merchant as counsel of record per exhibit spreadsheet.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2025-07-30', 'Status hearing — supervised bail reinstated; pro se restrictions continued', 'Minutes report supervised bail at $25,000, continued restrictions on pro se filings, and no-contact directions involving DA''s office.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["faretta_self_representation","warrant_or_bail_defect"]', 60001),
('2025-08-06', 'Petition for writ of mandamus — recusal of Judge Breslow sought', 'Church filed petition for writ of mandamus seeking recusal of Judge Breslow and venue transfer.', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'confirmed', 1, '["judicial_disqualification_bias"]', 60001),
('2025-08-07', 'Order striking writ — defendant represented by counsel', 'Court struck writ because defendant was represented by counsel.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["faretta_self_representation","access_to_courts_interference"]', 60001),
('2025-08-21', 'Figueroa withdrawal granted; no-bail warrant issued; Faretta conditioned on arrest', 'Minutes state Figueroa withdrawal was granted, no-bail warrant issued for failure to appear, and Faretta hearing was conditioned on arrest.', 'CR23-0657', 'warrant', 'confirmed', 1, '["faretta_self_representation","warrant_or_bail_defect"]', 60001),
('2025-09-26', 'State files notice of bail-condition violation', 'DDA Stege filed notice alleging email to DDA Merchant regarding a medical emergency constituted a threat. State allegation.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["retaliation_first_amendment"]', 60001),
('2025-10-02', 'Defendant files notice of constitutional violations — 900+ days of delay alleged', 'Church filed notice/demand for clarification charting 900+ days of delay and claimed hearing defects. Allegations in filing.', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'alleged', 1, '["speedy_trial_delay","due_process_defect","faretta_self_representation"]', 60001),
('2025-10-23', 'Renewed motion for criminal referral of DDA Aziz Merchant', 'Church filed renewed referral motion alleging fraud on the court regarding amended complaints and GPS tracker representations. Allegations in filing.', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'alleged', 1, '["prosecutorial_misconduct","fourth_amendment_search_seizure"]', 60001),
('2025-11-26', 'Motion to dismiss for structural constitutional violations; warrants quashed; written findings demanded', 'Church filed motion and declaration seeking dismissal, warrant quashal, and written constitutional findings. Challenges nunc pro tunc alterations and competency-stay issues. Allegations in filing.', 'CR23-0657', 'motion', 'alleged', 1, '["speedy_trial_delay","nunc_pro_tunc_concern","competency_proceeding_abuse","due_process_defect"]', 60001);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2N1WTErRdSjheBh.e46440e12186 --database 3yhU3DrKzf8Z5BNtvxatFF --execute
